ui_hints.resources: Four meters at the top: treasury, happiness, order, and elite loyalty.
ui_hints.visible_effects: Some options show only part of the impact before you choose.
ui_hints.hidden_consequences: Results may reveal effects you did not see on the card.
ui_hints.laws: New laws stay active until something repeals them. Tap the laws bar to read them.
ui_hints.advisors: Each card comes from an advisor with their own agenda.
ui_hints.affinity_feedback: Advisors react to your choices. Watch for approval or disappointment.
ui_hints.ruler_traits: Your repeated choices shape how history remembers your rule.
ui_hints.delayed_followups: Some choices echo later. The country remembers.
ui_hints.hard_followups: Urgent problems can demand an immediate answer.
ui_hints.crises: Crises need a decision before normal business resumes.
ui_hints.endings_replay: Every run can end differently. Try again to discover more endings.
ui_hints.no_perfect_option: Every choice trades something away. There is no free lunch.
